curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #7223 into apache/inlong master. The fix modifies the filterSensitive method in MySQLSinkDTO.java to decode the JDBC URL in a loop (while it still contains '%') instead of a single pass. This prevents double-URL-encoding bypass of the sensitive parameter filter (autoDeserialize, allowLoadLocalInfile, etc.). The InlongConstants.java change only adds a PERCENT constant used by the fix. No sibling sink DTOs (PostgreSQL, Oracle, etc.) have the filterSensitive pattern, so no additional locations were added. Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed from CWE-502 and advisory description.
